---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$report_author`"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B %Y')`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
params:
  report_title: "RNASeq Insight – Arabidopsis thaliana TAIR10"
  report_author: "Eulalio Santos – UFV"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr); library(dplyr); library(ggplot2)
  library(knitr); library(DT); library(pheatmap)
  library(scales)
})

safe_read <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) return(NULL)
  tryCatch(read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE), error = function(e) NULL)
}

de_all    <- safe_read("deseq2_data/deseq2_results_all.tsv")
de_sig    <- safe_read("deseq2_data/deseq2_results_sig.tsv")
norm      <- safe_read("deseq2_data/normalized_counts.tsv")
go_bp     <- safe_read("enrichment_data/go_bp_results.tsv")
kegg      <- safe_read("enrichment_data/kegg_results.tsv")
splicing  <- safe_read("splicing_data/splicing_significant.tsv")
modules   <- safe_read("wgcna_data/wgcna_modules.tsv")
ranking   <- safe_read("integration_data/gene_ranking.tsv")
cands     <- safe_read("integration_data/key_candidates.tsv")
```

## 1. Expressão Diferencial

```{r de-summary}
if (!is.null(de_all)) {
  n_up   <- sum(de_all$regulation == "up",   na.rm = TRUE)
  n_down <- sum(de_all$regulation == "down", na.rm = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf("**Genes up-regulated:** %d  \n**Genes down-regulated:** %d  \n**Total DEGs:** %d",
              n_up, n_down, n_up + n_down))
}
```

```{r volcano, fig.width=7, fig.height=5, fig.cap="Volcano Plot"}
if (!is.null(de_all)) {
  df <- de_all |> filter(!is.na(padj))
  colors <- c("up"="#E41A1C","down"="#377EB8","ns"="grey70")
  ggplot(df, aes(log2FoldChange, -log10(padj), color = regulation)) +
    geom_point(alpha=0.5, size=1) +
    scale_color_manual(values=colors) +
    geom_vline(xintercept=c(-1,1), linetype="dashed", color="grey40") +
    geom_hline(yintercept=-log10(0.05), linetype="dashed", color="grey40") +
    labs(title="Volcano Plot", x="log2 Fold Change", y="-log10(padj)") +
    theme_bw()
}
```

```{r de-table}
if (!is.null(de_sig)) {
  de_sig |> head(50) |>
    select(gene_id, log2FoldChange, baseMean, padj, regulation) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), \(x) round(x,4))) |>
    kable(caption = "Top 50 DEGs")
}
```

## 2. Enriquecimento Funcional

### GO Biological Process

```{r go-bp, fig.width=8, fig.height=6, fig.cap="GO Biological Process"}
if (!is.null(go_bp) && nrow(go_bp) > 0) {
  df <- go_bp |> head(20) |>
    mutate(GR = sapply(GeneRatio, function(r) eval(parse(text=r))))
  ggplot(df, aes(GR, reorder(Description, GR), size=Count, color=p.adjust)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_gradient(low="red", high="blue") +
    labs(x="Gene Ratio", y=NULL, title="GO Biological Process – Top 20") +
    theme_bw()
} else {
  cat("Nenhum resultado GO-BP disponível.")
}
```

### KEGG Pathways

```{r kegg, fig.width=8, fig.height=6, fig.cap="KEGG Pathways"}
if (!is.null(kegg) && nrow(kegg) > 0) {
  df <- kegg |> head(20) |>
    mutate(GR = sapply(GeneRatio, function(r) eval(parse(text=r))))
  ggplot(df, aes(GR, reorder(Description, GR), size=Count, color=p.adjust)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_gradient(low="red", high="blue") +
    labs(x="Gene Ratio", y=NULL, title="KEGG Pathways – Top 20") +
    theme_bw()
} else {
  cat("Nenhum resultado KEGG disponível.")
}
```

## 3. Splicing Alternativo

```{r splicing-summary}
has_spl <- !is.null(splicing) && nrow(splicing) > 0 && "event_type" %in% colnames(splicing)

type_labels <- c(SE="Skipped Exon", RI="Retained Intron",
                 A5SS="Alt. 5' Splice Site", A3SS="Alt. 3' Splice Site",
                 MXE="Mutually Exclusive Exons")
type_colors <- c(SE="#E41A1C", RI="#377EB8", A5SS="#4DAF4A", A3SS="#FF7F00", MXE="#984EA3")

if (has_spl) {
  cat(sprintf("**Eventos significativos** (FDR < 0.05, |ΔPSI| > 0.1): **%d**\n\n", nrow(splicing)))
  splicing |> count(event_type, name = "Eventos") |>
    mutate(Tipo = coalesce(type_labels[event_type], event_type)) |>
    select(Tipo, event_type, Eventos) |>
    rename(`Código` = event_type) |>
    arrange(desc(Eventos)) |>
    kable(caption = "Eventos por tipo")
} else {
  cat("Nenhum evento de splicing significativo encontrado.")
}
```

```{r splicing-barplot, fig.width=6, fig.height=4, fig.cap="Eventos significativos por tipo"}
if (has_spl) {
  splicing |> count(event_type) |>
    ggplot(aes(reorder(event_type, -n), n, fill = event_type)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_text(aes(label = n), vjust = -0.4, size = 4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = type_colors) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Número de eventos",
         title = "Splicing Alternativo Significativo") +
    theme_bw()
}
```

```{r splicing-violin, fig.width=7, fig.height=5, fig.cap="Distribuição de ΔPSI por tipo de evento"}
if (has_spl && "IncLevelDifference" %in% colnames(splicing)) {
  splicing |>
    filter(!is.na(IncLevelDifference)) |>
    ggplot(aes(event_type, IncLevelDifference, fill = event_type)) +
    geom_violin(alpha = 0.7, draw_quantiles = 0.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.12, size = 0.7, alpha = 0.35, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(-0.1, 0.1), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = type_colors) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "ΔPSI (IncLevelDifference)",
         title = "Distribuição de ΔPSI por Tipo de Splicing") +
    theme_bw()
}
```

```{r splicing-table}
if (has_spl) {
  gene_col <- intersect(c("geneSymbol", "GeneID", "gene_id"), colnames(splicing))[1]
  psi_col  <- if ("IncLevelDifference" %in% colnames(splicing)) "IncLevelDifference" else NULL
  fdr_col  <- if ("FDR"               %in% colnames(splicing)) "FDR"               else NULL

  cols <- c(gene_col, "event_type", psi_col, fdr_col)
  cols <- cols[!is.na(cols)]

  tbl <- splicing |>
    select(all_of(cols)) |>
    arrange(if (!is.null(fdr_col)) .data[[fdr_col]] else event_type)

  if (!is.null(psi_col)) tbl[[psi_col]] <- round(tbl[[psi_col]], 3)
  if (!is.null(fdr_col)) tbl[[fdr_col]] <- formatC(tbl[[fdr_col]], format = "e", digits = 2)

  nice_names <- c("Gene", "Tipo de Evento", "ΔPSI", "FDR")[seq_along(cols)]

  DT::datatable(
    tbl,
    colnames    = nice_names,
    caption     = sprintf("Eventos de splicing significativos (%d total)", nrow(tbl)),
    filter      = "top",
    options     = list(pageLength = 15, scrollX = TRUE),
    rownames    = FALSE
  )
}
```

## 4. Co-expressão (WGCNA)

```{r wgcna}
if (!is.null(modules) && nrow(modules) > 0) {
  modules |> count(module, name="n_genes") |>
    arrange(desc(n_genes)) |>
    kable(caption="Genes por módulo WGCNA")
} else {
  cat("Resultados WGCNA não disponíveis.")
}
```

## 5. Integração Multi-ômica

```{r integration, fig.width=8, fig.height=7, fig.cap="Top 20 genes por Integration Score"}
if (!is.null(ranking) && nrow(ranking) > 0) {
  df <- ranking |> head(20)
  ggplot(df, aes(integration_score, reorder(gene_id, integration_score), fill=regulation)) +
    geom_col() +
    scale_fill_manual(values=c("up"="#E41A1C","down"="#377EB8")) +
    labs(x="Integration Score (0–10)", y=NULL,
         title="Top 20 Genes Candidatos") +
    theme_bw()
}
```

```{r candidates-table}
if (!is.null(cands) && nrow(cands) > 0) {
  cands |> head(30) |>
    select(gene_id, log2FoldChange, padj, integration_score, evidence_layers,
           has_splicing, in_pathway, is_hub) |>
    mutate(across(c(log2FoldChange, integration_score), \(x) round(x,3)),
           padj = formatC(padj, format="e", digits=2)) |>
    kable(caption="Candidatos Chave (evidência ≥ 2 camadas)")
}
```

## 6. Sessão R

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
